ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., fresh, other) */,
  "item_fat_content" TEXT /* Fat content of the item (e.g., Low Fat, Regular) */,
  "item_visibility" REAL /* Visibility of the item */,
  "item_mrp" REAL /* Maximum Retail Price of the item */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., dairy, produce) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "item_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the supplier table */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item image */,
  "item_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the item */,
  "item_stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the item */,
  "item_reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_type FOREIGN KEY ("item_type") REFERENCES item_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_fat_content FOREIGN KEY ("item_fat_content") REFERENCES fat_contents ("fat_content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the outlet */,
  "outlet_establishment_year" TEXT /* Establishment year of the outlet */,
  "outlet_size" TEXT /* Size of the outlet (e.g., Small, Medium, High) */,
  "outlet_location_type" TEXT /* Location type of the outlet (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 2, Tier 3) */,
  "outlet_type" TEXT /* Type of the outlet (e.g., Supermarket Type1, Supermarket Type2, Grocery Store) */,
  "outlet_address" TEXT /* Full address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the outlet */,
  "outlet_email" TEXT /* Email address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_manager_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table for the outlet manager */,
  "outlet_opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the outlet */,
  "outlet_closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the outlet */,
  "outlet_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the outlet */,
  "outlet_social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the outlet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_outlet_type FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_type") REFERENCES outlet_types ("outlet_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_outlet_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_outlet_size FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_size") REFERENCES outlet_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_outlet_location_type FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_location_type") REFERENCES outlet_location_types ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_outlet_sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being sold */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet where the item is sold */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "sales_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sales_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "sales_tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the sale */,
  "sales_net_amount" REAL /* Net amount of the sale after discount and tax */,
  "sales_employee_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table for the sales employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_outlet_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_outlet_sales_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_outlet_sales_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  "type_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the type image */,
  "type_icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the type icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fat_contents" (
  "fat_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fat content */,
  "fat_content_name" TEXT /* Name of the fat content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fat content */,
  "fat_content_icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the fat content icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fat_content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlet size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outlet size */,
  "size_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the size image */,
  "size_icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the size icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  "location_type_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the location type image */,
  "location_type_icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the location type icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_types" (
  "outlet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet type */,
  "outlet_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlet type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outlet type */,
  "outlet_type_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the outlet type image */,
  "outlet_type_icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the outlet type icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, sales analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
